description: 6 个官方业务 plugin,通过 BasePlugin 接口挂入 PluginRegistry。V7(2026-04-22)起,所有 plugin 由 channel_server.plugin_loader 在启动时 config-driven 自动发现和注册(扫 plugins/ namespace package + 用户目录 ~/.zchat/plugins/,从 plugins.toml [plugins.<name>] 读配置,signature-driven DI 注入 emit_event / peer plugin)。plugin __init__ 签名统一为 (config: dict, emit_event, **injections)。plugins/ 是 namespace package(extend_path),支持与根目录 plugins/ 合并以便部署期第三方 plugin 扩展。业务语义集中在此层:mode(copilot/takeover)/resolve(结案)/sla(双 timer 守护)/audit(数据统计持久化)/activation(休眠+回访)/csat(评分卡片)。core 的 router 不感知这些事件名,只做分派。

key_classes_functions.name: ModePlugin
key_classes_functions.purpose: channel mode 管理(copilot/takeover),命令:/hijack /release /copilot,emit mode_changed event(from/to/triggered_by/cmd)。query('get',{channel}) 返回当前 mode(默认 copilot)。

key_classes_functions.name: ResolvePlugin
key_classes_functions.purpose: /resolve 命令 → emit channel_resolved event(resolved_by)。无持久化。

key_classes_functions.name: SlaPlugin
key_classes_functions.purpose: SLA 守护双 timer:Timer1 takeover 超时(默认 180s)→ emit sla_breach + emit_command('release');Timer2 求助等待(检测 __side 中首个 @-mention 为 HELP_REQUEST_MARKERS = (@operator/@人工/@admin/@客服))→ emit help_requested + 启 timer,超时 emit help_timeout;bridge 中继的 side(source 含 cs-bot)取消 timer。

key_classes_functions.name: _first_at_is_help_marker
key_classes_functions.purpose: 只在 text 第一个 @-token 是 marker 时触发,避免 agent 互 quote marker 误触发。

key_classes_functions.name: AuditPlugin
key_classes_functions.purpose: 运行时统计 + JSON 持久化(audit.json,atomic tmp+replace):每 channel 状态(active/takeover/resolved)/takeovers 列表/first_message/first_reply_at/message_count/csat_score;record_csat API 供 csat plugin 调用。query('status'/'report')。

key_classes_functions.name: AuditPlugin._compute_aggregates
key_classes_functions.purpose: 聚合 KPI: escalation_resolve_rate = takeover_then_resolve/total_takeovers, csat_mean。

key_classes_functions.name: AuditPlugin._looks_like_agent
key_classes_functions.purpose: source 含 '-' 且不在 _INFRASTRUCTURE_SOURCES={cs-bot/internal/card_action} 视为 agent。

key_classes_functions.name: ActivationPlugin
key_classes_functions.purpose: channel 活跃度跟踪(activation-state.json):每条消息更新 last_activity;channel_resolved → is_dormant=True + last_closed_at;dormant channel 新消息 → emit customer_returned(sender/preview/last_closed_at)。

key_classes_functions.name: CsatPlugin
key_classes_functions.purpose: CSAT 评分链路:channel_resolved → emit csat_request(bridge 发卡片);订阅 csat_score 事件(1-5)→ audit.record_csat + emit csat_recorded。直接引用 AuditPlugin(懒耦合)。

tests: tests/unit/test_resolve_plugin.py — 2 test: command handle + channel_resolved emit
tests/unit/test_sla_plugin.py — 12 test: takeover timer/help timer/marker first-at/quoted marker 不触发/human relay 取消/双 channel 独立
tests/unit/test_csat_plugin.py — 7 test: csat_request trigger/score recorded/invalid/out-of-range/non-event ignored/works without audit
tests/e2e/test_help_request_lifecycle.py — 3 test: operator 及时响应/超时/help+takeover 双 timer 独立
tests/e2e/test_plugin_pipeline.py — 3 test: 全生命周期/escalation rate/csat via audit
evidence_file_lines: src/plugins/__init__.py:1-3 — namespace package 合并根 plugins/
src/plugins/sla/plugin.py:138-173 — on_ws_message 检测 __side + 首个 @ marker
